full_suite.failure_notes: Literal EXIT 1 after 2827.94s. (1) Pre-existing landed Track I manifest/test mismatch: test_best_stack_manifest_integrity pins revision 12 while adopted commit 0ec239325 made the manifest revision 13; neither file is placewire-owned or modified. (2) Twenty-five pre-existing owner/CAL worktree data failures: test_compare_img1605_partial_labels_rejects_current_bad_proposal; test_real_burlington_fixture_preserves_legacy_numeric_payload_and_adds_typed_contract; seventeen test_court_finding_technology_benchmark failures (discover samples, line-refined score, distance-mask selector, refined selector, adapter report, HSV report, pretrained-shadow unavailable, regulation selector, temporal line, temporal persistent, temporal regulation, temporal persistent regulation, balanced selector, persistent-tail selector, reviewed oracle, temporal reviewed oracle, CLI report); test_build_report_includes_img1605_partial_visible_gate; test_img1605_progress_builds_partial_visible_label_payload; test_visible_floor_homography_infers_img1605_occluded_corner; test_visible_floor_homography_requires_four_floor_points; and both overlapping-court-calibration report/CLI tests. Their signatures are dirty reviewed-label hashes/counts, the untracked pbvision sample, and owner_IMG_1605 partial-frame additions already present before this lane; Track C's pre-lane ruling independently recorded the same court-family worktree contamination. (3) Eight managed-sandbox socket failures: three court_keypoint_review_server token/page tests and three review_input_server token/page tests fail at TCP bind with PermissionError [Errno 1]; persistent-worker round-trip and idle-timeout tests fail at AF_UNIX bind with PermissionError [Errno 1]. (4) Mid-run unrelated Track F storage contamination: test_storage_policy_audit_classifies_large_worktree_artifacts failed after commit d1b536b3f landed at 22:42:35 during the 47-minute wide run, adding runs/lanes/trk_detbench_20260716/transfer_stage/pickleball_head.bundle (154743315 bytes) without audit registration. Pre-wide HEAD 6d8d60ff1 did not contain the path and the mandatory focused suite was 199/199 before that commit. A post-wide focused rerun now shows both storage mirror failures and no placewire failures: 197 passed, 2 failed.

honest_issues: This is wiring-only scoped evidence. No real clip, GPU BODY run, or independent NS-02 placement ground truth was run; preview_band, do_not_promote, and VERIFIED=0 remain binding.

The full wide suite's literal exit is 1. All 35 failures are attributed outside placewire, but the repo is not globally green; the mid-run Track F storage failure was concurrent/unrelated rather than pre-existing, so failures_all_preexisting is correctly false and the lane result cannot be PASS.

Default-OFF byte parity is proven at the stage payload-artifact boundary: all existing inputs remain byte-identical and no refined artifact is emitted. The canonical PIPELINE_SUMMARY necessarily gains the new typed skipped-stage row, so the summary artifact itself is not byte-identical to the pre-wiring graph.

Current HEAD has two storage-policy failures from Track F commit d1b536b3f's unregistered 154743315-byte bundle. They landed during this lane's wide run; this lane did not edit storage allowlists or the Track F artifact.
The adopted rev-13 best-stack entry is consumed without edit, but tests/racketsport/test_best_stack_manifest.py still pins revision 12 outside this lane's ownership and fails independently.

Raw tracks.json, placement.json, skeleton3d.json, foot_contact_phases.json, and grounding artifacts are never overwritten by this stage. Downstream OneWorld/fusion consumers remain intentionally untouched.
BEST-STACK DELTA = "(b) consumes the existing rev-13 PENDING entry, no edit".
